case_title: LORD, KATHLEEN VS PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LORD, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY GUZMAN, MICK AN INDIVIDUAL & C/O PACIFIC BELL DIR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RULING ON REQUEST TO RECONSIDER SENT TO PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY RETURNED--ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
CERTIFIED MAILING TO PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY RETURNED TO C0URT SIGNED,
OPPOSITION TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT FILED.
PLFT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED 5/22/03; MOTION GRANTED: THE MOTION IS AMENDED AS FOLLOWS: THE CONTRACT BETWEEN PLFT LORD & DEFT PACIFIC BELL
DIRECTORY FOR AN ADVERTISEMENT IN THE SANTA CRUZ YELLOW PAGES IS RESCINDED. NOTICE SENT TO BOTH PLFT AND DEFT.
REQUEST TO CORRECT/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY GINA BELLO FOR DEFT PACIFIC BELL, REC'D ONLY. WAITING FOR $15.40 CHK.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, MICK AN INDIVIDUAL & C/O PACIFIC BELL DIR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LORD, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY GUZMAN, MICK AN INDIVIDUAL & C/O PACIFIC BELL DIR. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00, MIKE GUZMAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT. PAPERS ON FILE.
COPIES OF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT MAILED TO PARTIES.
NOTICE OF MOREC SENT TO PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY RETURNED--MOVED, LEFT NO ADDRESS; REFUSED; ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN
DEFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT/VACATE JUDGMENT; MOTION DENIED BY COMM. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO VACATE OR CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLFT RETURNED FOR NO PAYMENT ENCLOSED. SENT SC45.
OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: RETURN TO SENDER, ADDRESSE NO LONGER W/PACIFIC BELL DIRECTOR.
FEE OF $15.40 SENT BY DEFT FOR THE FILING OF OF REQUEST TO CORRCT OR VACATE JUDGMENT.
